summary: iOS | FOCUS 2 | Apps settings section is missing
scenario: Missing "Apps" settings section when pairing Focus 2 and navigating to Device settings
description_clean: The "Apps" settings section is missing when pairing Focus 2 with the app and navigating to Device settings. According to Focus 2 UI specs, the Apps section should be present with Amazon Alexa and Tile options.
expected: The "Apps" settings section should be present with Amazon Alexa and Tile options.
